docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN FILED BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SAMER IBRAHIM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. APPEARING IN COURT FOR THE DEFENDANT IS DAN SCANLAN. PARTIES WERE INSTRUCTED BY JUDGE MAYFIELD TO AMICABLY SETTLE OUTSIDE THE COURTROOM. HOWEVER, AFTER A BRIEF RECESS PARTIES CAME BACK AND REPORTED THAT THEY FAILED COME TO AN AGREEMENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2026 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-31-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY IBRAHIM, SAMER AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM, SAMER AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-14-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAMER IBRAHIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. ***THE COURT FINDS THAT PROOF OF SERVICE IS NOT PROPER.*** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGRET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY IBRAHIM, SAMER
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM, SAMER AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM, SAMER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEGSCO SAN FRANCISCO $10,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,690.00, VALUE OF BMW SOLD AT AUCTION ($7600.00). STORAGE FEES OWED TO TEGSCO ARE WAIVED. TRANSPORTATION COSTS ($3000). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
